_comment: Claude Code on Windows host -> MCP server inside WSL2. Replace USERNAME with your WSL username (run `wsl -- whoami` from PowerShell). Merge mcpServers.memory into %USERPROFILE%\.claude\settings.json. If Claude Code runs INSIDE WSL (e.g. via VS Code Remote-WSL), do NOT use this file -- use the regular Linux settings with a plain `.venv/bin/python` command.
